title: System expert (fire alarm systems), Turku
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
what_we_offer: A versatile and responsible role in a growing industry
The opportunity to develop your skills as an expert in the field
Competitive salary and good employment benefits
A professional and supportive work community
jobcontent:
Are fire alarm systems your thing? As a hundred-year-old family business, we build a sustainable and responsible society - would you like to be part of this group? If you answered yes, then continue reading. We are now looking for a competent and self-initiated systems expert for a permanent employment in our real estate services to be responsible for the comprehensive management of fire alarm equipment projects.

As a system expert, you are responsible for the smooth implementation of fire alarm projects from start to finish. The position combines versatile field and office work, offering a varied and responsible role as part of our expert team. Your main tasks are:

Office work:

- Financial monitoring and budgeting of projects

- Customer cooperation and communication with stakeholders

- Scheduling and resource management

- Documentation and reporting

Field work:

- Programming and commissioning of fire alarm equipment

- Project and installation work at sites

- Maintenance and troubleshooting tasks

- Cooperation with installers and other contractors

Our real estate services handle e.g. building maintenance and maintenance tasks for shopping centers, hotels and office properties. In addition to the technical functionality and energy efficiency of our customer properties, our responsibility is to ensure pleasant conditions for the end users.

The person we're looking for

- Appropriate technical training (e.g. electrical or automation)

- Experience with fire alarm equipment or similar systems

- Good organizational and project management skills

- Customer-oriented approach and good interaction skills

- Ability to work independently and in a team

- Willingness to move around construction sites

- We consider fire alarm programming expertise in Schneider, Hedengren, Panasonic or Eltek systems as an advantage, as well as expertise in communication network and IP technology

We offer

- A versatile and responsible role in a growing industry

- The opportunity to develop your skills as an expert in the field

- Competitive salary and good employment benefits

- A professional and supportive work community

As a family-owned company, we work with a good attitude. You have the support of a competent team and your own supervisor. You get to do work with interesting destinations, your working days are suitably varied and you can influence the course of the day yourself. We offer you opportunities to develop professionally or even find new career paths.

We are waiting for your application no later than May 8, 2026. Act quickly, because the position will be filled as soon as a suitable applicant is found. For more information about the position, please contact service manager Joni Vainiotalo, tel. 050 525 1247 or email joni.vainiotalo@are.fi.

ARE

ARE is a Finnish family business with over a hundred years of experience in building technology. We offer solutions and services for the entire life cycle of the property, from building engineering contracting for new properties, to maintenance and service, from maintenance to modernization and repair construction. We want to be a trendsetter in building technology, and that's why we are constantly developing our operations. We work closely together with our customers to find the best solutions, whether it's an office, hotel, hospital or industrial facility. The goal is always energy-efficient facilities and pleasant indoor conditions for the users of the facilities, implemented in a cost-effective manner

Phone: 020 530 5500 Email: hr@are.fi Location: Lemminkäisenkatu 32 B, 20520 Turku

ARE is a Finnish family business with over a hundred years of experience in building technology. We offer solutions and services for the entire life cycle of the property, from building engineering contracting for new properties, to maintenance and service, from maintenance to modernization and repair construction. We want to be a trendsetter in building technology, and that's why we are constantly developing our operations. We work closely together with our customers to find the best solutions, whether it's an office, hotel, hospital or industrial facility. The goal is always energy-efficient facilities and pleasant indoor conditions for the users of the facilities, implemented in a cost-effective manner

title: Sales Manager, Defense
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
jobcontent:
We are looking for Sales Manager, Defense to build and boost our Defense business area growth. As Sales Manager, you wont just sellyoull build and shape a new business area from the ground up together with the team. This is a role where your relationship-building skills, solution-orientated sales approach and technical insight will directly influence our success in a complex and evolving market.

In this role, you will be working in close cooperation with other business, sales, marketing and technical experts. We expect you to have previous sales experience but will have room to grow in this role to be a professional in solution selling.

In order to succeed you have to be curious, able to create tailored solutions for our customers and capable to understand the defense sectors decision-making frameworks.

Key-responsibilities:

 * Drive new business by identifying high-potential customers, understanding their operational and technical requirements, and turning those needs into tailored solutions, strong value propositions, and long-term partnerships that support sustainable growth.
 * Be a trusted advisor and ambassador in a growth-driven transformation,where our automotive expertise is expanded into new industrial sectors strengthening our presence and relationships with key defense stakeholders.
 * Participate developing and executing a scalable, forward-thinking sales strategy in collaboration with marketing and sales development, laying the foundation for a robust Defense sales function.
 * Work cross-functionally across finance, technology, operations, and commercial teams to shape competitive proposals and deliver customer-focused solutions that are both technically and commercially viable.
 * Represent Valmet Automotive at defense-specific forums, key industry events and exhibitionsto expand our network and uncover new opportunities.
 * Drive innovation and change by introducing best practices, challenging the status quo, and helping to establish a modern, agile sales culture within a newly formed team.

Youll be a great fit if you:

 * Are proactive, resilient, and curious ready to take ownership, adapt quickly, and find creative solutions in defense landscape.
 * Have experience in B2B or B2G sales in solution selling or consultative sales environments. Exposure to defense sector stakeholders are considered as an advantage.
 * Understand our competence and can translate it into customer value by creating tailored solutions, and are interested in manufacturing technologies or willing to develop your understanding of them.
 * You are able to simplify complex technical concepts for diverse audiences.Communicate confidently and clearly in Finnish and English, German or Swedish as a plus.
 * Excel in social situations and collaboration, building trust both internally and externally.
 * Have a commercial or technical degree: M.Sc., or B.Sc. of technical or commercial field.
 * Are eligible for a standard security clearance.

Location & Work Flexibility:
Our main operationsarebased inUusikaupunki,andthis rolerequires regular on-site presence as well as travelling.However,youllalso have theoptionto work from our officepremisesin Turkuand Helsinki, withadditionalflexibility for remote work.

Why Join Us?
 * Be part of a new and growing business, where you have genuine freedom to shape sales processes and strategy while building new business from the ground up.
 * Play a key role in shaping the future of Defense sales in a high-impact position, working closely with top-tier industry partners as well as decision-makers both inside and outside the organization.
 * Work in a learningoriented organization with modern leadership and plenty of opportunities to develop your skills, influence your role, and advance your career.
 * An ePassi benefit that can be used for sports, culture, and wellbeing services.In addition, all employees have free access to our Harrastetalo Laturi activity center, which offers gym and workout facilities, free group exercise classes, and a golf simulator.

Now its your turn - Apply latest by 30.4.2026!

For further information
Antti Havola
Vice President, Defense Business
tel. 046851 2052

To apply: https://valmet-automotive-oy.contactrh.com/jobs/14225/44101941

title: Combination vehicle driver Oulu
what_we_offer: Competitive salary and bonuses according to TES
A fair and open work atmosphere and a professional team to support you
Are you ready to seize the opportunity?
We want to make your job search effortless and easy. Leave your contact information and a short description of yourself and your skills via the application form below.
Start your new career here and submit your application today!
At YES, we want to find you a job that looks like you. We can offer you a wide variety of work, but also different working models that suit your schedule and life situation.
You can easily combine your free time hobbies or studies with the jobs we offer.
Our industries include e.g. construction, industry, logistics, office and trade sector and hotel and restaurant sector.
jobcontent:
We are looking for a combination vehicle driver for our client to deliver piece goods to the Oulu economic area for summer deliveries!

In this position, you are responsible for transporting individual or bulk goods on the routes of Oulu and the surrounding areas. The work may also include frame transports or handling of exchange pallets, depending on the customer's needs. The jobs can be either day or night shifts.

The work starts according to the agreement

We expect from you:

- A valid CE driver's license

- Digital plotter card and valid professional qualification

- Experience driving a combination vehicle

- Independent and responsible approach to work

- Good physical condition and customer service mentality

We consider it an advantage:

- Experience in unit cargo or food transport

- ADR card

- Flexibility and good local knowledge in the Oulu region

We offer:

- Competitive salary and bonuses according to TES

- Good tools and safe equipment

- A fair and open work atmosphere and a professional team to support you

Are you ready to seize the opportunity?

We want to make your job search effortless and easy. Leave your contact information and a short description of yourself and your skills via the application form below.

Start your new career here and submit your application today!

title: Other gas station employee, Tuorilan SEO-Palvelu Oy, Tuorilan SEO, Merikarvia
jobapply_link: mailto:marianne.puistonen@gmail.com?subject=Application for the Job - Muu huoltoasematyöntekijä, Tuorilan SEO-Palvelu Oy, Tuorilan SEO, Merikarvia
what_we_expect: comply with food-related health, safety, hygiene and other relevant legislation
take food and drink orders from customers
work in a group in the tourism, accommodation or catering sector
takes care of the gas station yard
jobcontent:
We are looking for cheerful, self-starting employees for a summer job at a gas station. Hygiene pass, Alcoholic drink pass is considered an advantage, can also be obtained at the workplace.

Cafe work, customer service and sales work, Rolls hamburgers, menu dishes, lunch available during the day. part-time job, summer job

Gas station 8 along the road, at the intersection of Merikarvia and Siikaistentien.

job applications: marianne.puistonen@gmail.com

title: Fish delicacies seller/Cafe worker - for the summer season
company: Kalaliike Marja Nätti Avoin Yhtiö, Kahvila Katiska
jobapply_link: mailto:marja.natti@elisanet.fi?subject=Application for the Job - Kalaherkkujen myyjä/Kahvilatyöntekijä - kesäsesongin ajaksi
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
what_we_expect: tell customers about the types of coffee and tea
jobcontent:
We are looking for a cheerful seller of fish delicacies and a cafe worker for the summer season until the end of September 2026. Kalaliike Marja Nätti is known for its high-quality fish delicacies and warm customer service. Now we are looking for a new worker to join us, who has a smile on his face and a quick approach to work!

Duties: Sales and presentation of fish delicacies. General cleanliness and a good feeling in the store. Cafe customer service.

We expect from you: A cheerful and customer-oriented attitude Agility and self-initiative Previous experience in sales or cafe work and catering expertise is a plus. Send your CV in Finnish to: marja.natti(at)elisanet.fi

https://kalaliikemarjanatti.fi/

CV in Finnish to email: marja.natti(at)elisanet.fi
